Pardon me, you must be Sister Hildegard.
I've heard tales of your healing hand and
your willingness to help wherever it’s
needed. \N<Alaric>
People2
That would be me. And you are...?\N<Hildegard>
custon1
I’m Alaric, engineer and tinkerer of gears.
I’ve been tasked with maintaining the
Canal’s flow, but the water grows ever
fouler and my mechanisms are failing.\N<Alaric>
custon1
I need your help to repair the canal’s
channels and restore the flow. Would you
join me?\N<Alaric>
People2
Of course. The canal provides water for the
abbey and the villagers, if it stays
blocked, many will go thirsty or fall ill.
I will help you set it right.\N<Hildegard>
custon1
Splendid! Lets Move. We must head to the
canal tunnels. They lie in the slum just
east of the Old Town.\N<Alaric>
